report.summary: MegaETH L2 guide landed on disk since last cycle (page.tsx + OG SVG + data file). FOCIL ghost promotion still unresolved — directory absent. Middleware noindex blocking ~684 pages remains #1 critical blocker. Learn pages now at 170.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic delta vs last cycle: flat — overnight US hours (04:00 UTC), minimal organic session volume
No new keyword breakouts; impressions and CTR stable across existing rankings
Top pages holding steady: ETH staking calc, liberation-day post, exchange compare hub, DCA calc, gas tracker
CRITICAL (carry-over): Middleware noindex still blocks ~684 of 742 sitemap pages — only ~58 pillar pages indexable (8%)
PILLAR_PAGES set in middleware.ts is hardcoded at 58 entries, unchanged since last cycle

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since last standup (v3, 03:07 UTC): MegaETH Real-Time Blockchain L2 Guide built and landed on disk
MegaETH: page.tsx + OG SVG (og-megaeth-real-time-l2-2026.svg) + data file (learn-20260410-v3.ts) — ready for publish queue
Learn directories now at 170 (up from 168 in v2) — Sanctum + MegaETH added since yesterday
FOCIL guide: still ghost-promoted — /learn/focil-inclusion-lists-guide-2026/ directory does NOT exist on disk. Publish report lists it as 'pass' but page is missing
Blocked in queue: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets — no page.tsx (monad has parallel-evm variant only)
Pyth Network + Sanctum: both on disk, not yet promoted to PUBLISH_QUEUE
Tool pages from last publish (wallet-profiler, social-sentiment, wallet-security-audit, news-feed): promoted with metadata warnings — only 1/5 had proper metadata exports

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1) FIX CRITICAL: Sync middleware PILLAR_PAGES with PUBLISHED_PAGES — 684 pages de-indexed. This has persisted across 4+ standup cycles. Every hour this remains is lost crawl budget and zero organic discovery for new content.
2) RESOLVE GHOST: FOCIL guide marked promoted but directory missing — either build the page or remove from PUBLISHED_PAGES to prevent 404s and wasted crawl budget
3) PROMOTE NEW CONTENT: MegaETH, Pyth Network, and Sanctum guides are all on disk with full assets — add to PUBLISH_QUEUE for next publish cycle

metrics.label: FOCIL Ghost Promotion
metrics.value: Still missing — no directory on disk
